heading: Why we do what we do.
intro: Meet some of the students your support keeps in school. Back someone directly, or sponsor a new student for the year.

stories.name: Chintya
stories.alt: Ni Putu Chintya Pratiwi in cap and gown holding a Happy Graduation sign
stories.videoAlt: Ni Putu Chintya Pratiwi in cap and gown sharing her graduation testimonial
paragraphs: Ni Putu Chintya Pratiwi just graduated in accounting from Universitas Mahasaraswati Denpasar, and two weeks later she had already accepted her first job at an accounting firm.

Covering her education costs freed her family to build their own security. Her mum opened a laundry business that's now thriving, so she no longer has to clean kos to get by. When COVID cut her dad's salary in half, the program's extra help with clothes, school supplies, and a water filter carried them through the hardest stretch.

Today her dad's income has recovered, her mum has a steady business of her own, and Chintya contributes fully from her new job. The family now supports itself and is putting her two younger brothers through school. One scholarship, a whole family's future.

stories.name: Indah
stories.alt: Indah, a high-school student in Denpasar
paragraphs: Indah is the firstborn of two and a high-schooler at SMA Saraswati Denpasar. Alongside keeping top grades, she throws herself into school life, leading the student council and the theatre club.
In her spare time she tutors younger children to help her parents earn a little extra. She dreams of becoming a tax officer, and with another year of support she'll keep climbing toward it.
A sponsor covers her tuition, learning materials and uniform for the year, and keeps one of Bali's brightest students in the classroom.

stories.name: Wahyu
stories.alt: Wahyu, a middle-school student in his school uniform
paragraphs: Thanks to the generosity of supporters last year, Wahyu received an education scholarship through the Ragam Foundation's Scholarship Program, made possible by Community Assist 2024. He's now enrolled in 8th grade and back in school.
With continued support this year, we can help Wahyu complete his studies, and give that same opportunity to more children across Bali.
One year of sponsorship keeps him in class, in uniform, and on track to finish school.
